title: Job Openings at Moglow Beauty Spa
content:
Moglow Beauty Spa (also known as Moglow Skincare International & Spa) is a popular, highly-rated unisex med-spa, skincare brand, and beauty academy located in Wuse 2, Abuja, Nigeria. They specialize in advanced clinical skincare treatments for targeted concerns alongside deep relaxation and pampering packages. 

We are  recruiting to fill the following positions below:

1.) Spa Aesthetic Nurse

Job Location: Abuja

General Requirements
     

            
    




	Female applicants only
	Minimum of 2 years of relevant work experience
	Must reside in Abuja
	Previous experience in a spa, aesthetic clinic, or beauty/wellness brand is an added advantage
	Innovative, creative, and proactive
	Tech-savvy with good knowledge of digital tools
	Excellent communication and interpersonal skills
	Strong organizational and time management skills
	Ability to work independently and as part of a team
	Results-driven, accountable, and willing to learn.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Note: For more enquiries, WhatsApp 08025352632.

 

2.) Spa Manager

Job Location: Abuja

General Requirements


	Female applicants only
	Minimum of 2 years of relevant work experience
	Must reside in Abuja
	Previous experience in a spa, aesthetic clinic, or beauty/wellness brand is an added advantage
	Innovative, creative, and proactive
	Tech-savvy with good knowledge of digital tools
	Excellent communication and interpersonal skills
	Strong organizational and time management skills
	Ability to work independently and as part of a team
	Results-driven, accountable, and willing to learn.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Note: For more enquiries, WhatsApp 08025352632.

 

 

3.) Content Creator / Social Media Manager

Job Location: Abuja

General Requirements


	Female applicants only
	Minimum of 2 years of relevant work experience
	Must reside in Abuja
	Previous experience in a spa, aesthetic clinic, or beauty/wellness brand is an added advantage
	Innovative, creative, and proactive
	Tech-savvy with good knowledge of digital tools
	Excellent communication and interpersonal skills
	Strong organizational and time management skills
	Ability to work independently and as part of a team
	Results-driven, accountable, and willing to learn.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and portfolio to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Note: For more enquiries, WhatsApp 08025352632.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Warehouse Officer",
  "description": "DRYVA Logistics is an integrated logistics company, providing end to end supply chain management solutions. Our portfolio covers Third Party Logistics, E-Commerce Logistics and Warehousing. We are building a team of top talents who can grow fast into senior leadership.

We are&nbsp;recruiting to fill the position below:

&nbsp;Job Position: Warehouse Officer

Job Location: Rivers

Job Responsibilities


	Receive inbound goods, verify quantity/condition against waybills/PO/manifest, and record receipts (GRN).
	Flag and document discrepancies (shortage, damage, wrong item) and escalate immediately.
	Execute put-away into assigned locations; ensure correct labeling/tagging and location accuracy.
	Follow FIFO/FEFO rules and maintain safe stacking and aisle discipline.
	Pick orders per pick list, confirm accuracy, and stage for dispatch.
	Pack/label/shrink-wrap as required; support loading and ensure dispatch documents match physical counts.
	Coordinate with transport/security teams to meet dispatch timelines.
	Maintain accurate stock movement logs/WMS updates (receipts, transfers, issues, returns).
	Conduct cycle counts and support periodic stock counts; investigate and report variances.
	Track damaged/expired/quarantined items and ensure proper segregation.
	Keep clean records (receiving notes, bin cards/location logs, dispatch notes, count sheets).
	Prepare daily/weekly updates on inbound/outbound volumes, stock status, and operational issues.
	Maintain housekeeping (5S), enforce PPE use, and comply with safety and SOP requirements.
	Support truck loading/offloading and ensure dispatch counts match shipping documents.
	Work with transport team to meet dispatch timelines and turnaround time targets.
	Sign for inbound shipments when / where necessary
	Receive and Photocopy Waybills.
	Witness Seal Cutting.
	Truck arrival, loading and dispatch time tracking.
	Conduct truck inspection before loading.
	Ensure correct number and type of product is picked
	Compare quantity, labelling and address with order to ensure outgoing shipments are complete and correct
	Accept signatures for outbound as necessary
	Efficiently move product into outbound delivery vehicles
	Other tasks as may be assigned.


Requirements


	B.Sc or HND in Finance, Accounting, Business, Economics,&nbsp;&nbsp;Engineering or equivalent in a highly analytical field from a reputable institution.
	2-4 years of work experience in warehousing, preferably a similar role.
	Must have completed the NYSC program.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite (MS Word, Excel and PPT).
	Exceptional computer skills including MS Word, Excel, and Outlook
	Must be proficient in the use of Microsoft Office
	Supply chain/logistics certification might be an advantage
	Strong organizational, interpersonal, and communication skills.
	Attention to details, and problem-solving skills
	Strong work ethic, attention to detail and positive attitude
	Ability to work independently with minimal supervision


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their Resume and Cover Letter to: careers@dryva.com.ng using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

  "validThrough": "2026-08-14",

Warehouse Officer Job at DRYVA Logistics




        
    

        
        DRYVA Logistics is an integrated logistics company, providing end to end supply chain management solutions. Our portfolio covers Third Party Logistics, E-Commerce Logistics and Warehousing. We are building a team of top talents who can grow fast into senior leadership.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

 Job Position: Warehouse Officer

Job Location: Rivers

Job Responsibilities
     

            
    




	Receive inbound goods, verify quantity/condition against waybills/PO/manifest, and record receipts (GRN).
	Flag and document discrepancies (shortage, damage, wrong item) and escalate immediately.
	Execute put-away into assigned locations; ensure correct labeling/tagging and location accuracy.
	Follow FIFO/FEFO rules and maintain safe stacking and aisle discipline.
	Pick orders per pick list, confirm accuracy, and stage for dispatch.
	Pack/label/shrink-wrap as required; support loading and ensure dispatch documents match physical counts.
	Coordinate with transport/security teams to meet dispatch timelines.
	Maintain accurate stock movement logs/WMS updates (receipts, transfers, issues, returns).
	Conduct cycle counts and support periodic stock counts; investigate and report variances.
	Track damaged/expired/quarantined items and ensure proper segregation.
	Keep clean records (receiving notes, bin cards/location logs, dispatch notes, count sheets).
	Prepare daily/weekly updates on inbound/outbound volumes, stock status, and operational issues.
	Maintain housekeeping (5S), enforce PPE use, and comply with safety and SOP requirements.
	Support truck loading/offloading and ensure dispatch counts match shipping documents.
	Work with transport team to meet dispatch timelines and turnaround time targets.
	Sign for inbound shipments when / where necessary
	Receive and Photocopy Waybills.
	Witness Seal Cutting.
	Truck arrival, loading and dispatch time tracking.
	Conduct truck inspection before loading.
	Ensure correct number and type of product is picked
	Compare quantity, labelling and address with order to ensure outgoing shipments are complete and correct
	Accept signatures for outbound as necessary
	Efficiently move product into outbound delivery vehicles
	Other tasks as may be assigned.


Requirements


	B.Sc or HND in Finance, Accounting, Business, Economics,  Engineering or equivalent in a highly analytical field from a reputable institution.
	2-4 years of work experience in warehousing, preferably a similar role.
	Must have completed the NYSC program.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite (MS Word, Excel and PPT).
	Exceptional computer skills including MS Word, Excel, and Outlook
	Must be proficient in the use of Microsoft Office
	Supply chain/logistics certification might be an advantage
	Strong organizational, interpersonal, and communication skills.
	Attention to details, and problem-solving skills
	Strong work ethic, attention to detail and positive attitude
	Ability to work independently with minimal supervision


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their Resume and Cover Letter to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Social Media Handler",
  "description": "Walexbiz Group is a dynamic conglomerate dedicated to pushing the boundaries of industry. We are a reverence to the power of synergy and collaboration, with a diverse array of subsidiaries. Each of our subsidiaries is an example of industry greatness, driven by a shared dedication to innovation, integrity, and impact.

We are&nbsp;&nbsp;recruiting to fill the position below:

&nbsp;Job Position: Social Media Handler

Job Location: Abuja (FCT)&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time

Description


	The Social Media Handler is responsible for managing the organization&rsquo;s and its subsidiaries&rsquo; (e.g., Pubx) social media presence to strengthen brand visibility, drive audience engagement, and support overall marketing objectives.
	The role encompasses content development, community management, and performance analysis to ensure sustained growth and a consistent, positive brand image across all digital platforms.


Key Responsibilities
Content Creation &amp; Management:


	Develop, create, and schedule engaging content (text, images, videos) across social media platforms.
	Ensure all content aligns with brand voice, guidelines, and marketing objectives.
	Maintain a consistent posting schedule and content calendar.


Social Media Management:


	Manage and monitor social media accounts (e.g., Instagram, Facebook, X, TikTok, LinkedIn).
	Respond promptly to comments, messages, and customer inquiries.
	Build and nurture an active online community.


Campaign Execution:


	Support and execute social media campaigns, promotions, and product launches.
	Collaborate with marketing and design teams to deliver campaign content.
	Track campaign performance and optimize for better results.


Analytics &amp; Reporting:


	Monitor key metrics such as engagement, reach, and follower growth.
	Generate periodic performance reports and insights.
	Use analytics tools to improve content strategy and effectiveness.


Brand Monitoring &amp; Reputation Management:


	Monitor brand mentions and online conversations.
	Address negative feedback professionally and escalate issues when necessary.
	Maintain a positive and consistent brand image.


Trend &amp; Market Awareness:


	Stay updated on social media trends, tools, and best practices.
	Identify opportunities for creative campaigns and audience engagement.


Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)


	Engagement rate (likes, comments, shares)
	Follower growth
	Reach and impressions
	Response time to messages and comments
	Conversion from social media campaigns.


Job Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Marketing, Communications, or related field (preferred).
	1&ndash;3 years of experience in social media management or digital marketing.
	Strong content creation and copywriting skills.
	Familiarity with social media tools and analytics platforms.
	Creativity and attention to detail.


Core Competencies:


	Creativity and storytelling
	Communication and interpersonal skills
	Time management and organization
	Analytical thinking
	Adaptability to trends.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: hrm@walexbizgroup.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Social Media Handler Job at Walexbiz Group




        
    

        
        Walexbiz Group is a dynamic conglomerate dedicated to pushing the boundaries of industry. We are a reverence to the power of synergy and collaboration, with a diverse array of subsidiaries. Each of our subsidiaries is an example of industry greatness, driven by a shared dedication to innovation, integrity, and impact.

We are  recruiting to fill the position below:

 Job Position: Social Media Handler

Job Location: Abuja (FCT) 
Employment Type: Full-time

Description
     

            
    




	The Social Media Handler is responsible for managing the organization’s and its subsidiaries’ (e.g., Pubx) social media presence to strengthen brand visibility, drive audience engagement, and support overall marketing objectives.
	The role encompasses content development, community management, and performance analysis to ensure sustained growth and a consistent, positive brand image across all digital platforms.


Key Responsibilities
Content Creation & Management:


	Develop, create, and schedule engaging content (text, images, videos) across social media platforms.
	Ensure all content aligns with brand voice, guidelines, and marketing objectives.
	Maintain a consistent posting schedule and content calendar.


Social Media Management:


	Manage and monitor social media accounts (e.g., Instagram, Facebook, X, TikTok, LinkedIn).
	Respond promptly to comments, messages, and customer inquiries.
	Build and nurture an active online community.


Campaign Execution:


	Support and execute social media campaigns, promotions, and product launches.
	Collaborate with marketing and design teams to deliver campaign content.
	Track campaign performance and optimize for better results.


Analytics & Reporting:


	Monitor key metrics such as engagement, reach, and follower growth.
	Generate periodic performance reports and insights.
	Use analytics tools to improve content strategy and effectiveness.


Brand Monitoring & Reputation Management:


	Monitor brand mentions and online conversations.
	Address negative feedback professionally and escalate issues when necessary.
	Maintain a positive and consistent brand image.


Trend & Market Awareness:


	Stay updated on social media trends, tools, and best practices.
	Identify opportunities for creative campaigns and audience engagement.


Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)


	Engagement rate (likes, comments, shares)
	Follower growth
	Reach and impressions
	Response time to messages and comments
	Conversion from social media campaigns.


Job Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree in Marketing, Communications, or related field (preferred).
	1–3 years of experience in social media management or digital marketing.
	Strong content creation and copywriting skills.
	Familiarity with social media tools and analytics platforms.
	Creativity and attention to detail.


Core Competencies:


	Creativity and storytelling
	Communication and interpersonal skills
	Time management and organization
	Analytical thinking
	Adaptability to trends.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

Accountant Job at HR Nexus Limited




        
    

        
        HR Nexus Limited is a human resource consulting and talent acquisition firm based in Nigeria, primarily operating in Lagos and Abuja. Founded in 2022, the company serves as a strategic workforce partner providing end-to-end personnel solutions for both growing business owners and corporate job seekers.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Accountant

Job Location: Allen Avenue, Ikeja, Lagos
Work Schedule: 5 Working Days, 2 Days off

Requirements
     

            
    




	Minimum of 3 years of relevant work experience.
	Good communication and interpersonal skills.
	Professional appearance and positive attitude.
	Ability to work in a fast-paced environment.
	Must reside in Lagos or be willing to relocate.


Benefits


	Salary: N200,000 monthly.
	Layover accommodation available


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply
